## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, analytics access, and publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX delivered 5 articles for review; Prophecy publishing first article](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Need to set up Google Analytics/Search Console access for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Discussing blog structure and publishing cadence to balance SEO and storytelling](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Planning to refine internal workflow for content approvals and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Topics

### Content Delivery and Publishing

  - [3 articles delivered last week, 2 more this week for client review](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Publishing first article on ELT/ETL topic](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Discussing imagery, CTAs, and author attribution for articles](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Planning to space out publishing of backlog articles (every other day) rather than all at once](https://fathom.video/share/xmEPfFJFvFyxgsaZ4s3wKdiQ6SG2zZP9?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
